data.current_role_summary: Backend and AI Engineer specialized in high-performance system design and LLM-driven intelligence pipelines.
role_summary_bullets: Core Identity & Mission: Dedicated to engineering scalable, high-concurrency backend systems and optimizing AI workflows for production environments.
Domain Mastery: Expert in FastAPI, Node.js, and Python, with a strong focus on RAG, LangGraph, and vector-based retrieval architectures.
Quantifiable Impact: Achieved a ~60% reduction in persona generation latency and a 40% decrease in LLM API costs through optimized prompt orchestration.
Strategic Scope: Proven capacity to architect and deploy stateless, horizontally scalable services on Google Cloud Run capable of managing high-traffic real-time applications.
Leadership Philosophy: Founder-minded engineer who emphasizes rigorous load testing (k6), performance optimization, and evidence-based architectural case studies.
Current Momentum: Actively working at RefractOne while maintaining external projects; currently pursuing opportunities in the German technology market.

career_timeline.one_line_impact: Reduced persona generation latency by ~60% and LLM API costs by ~40% through parallel pipelines and prompt optimization.
